zudistutils.command.install_scripts
Implements the Distutils 'install_scripts' command, for installing
Python scripts.
Command)
log)
ST_MODEc
install_scriptsz%install scripts (Python or otherwise))
install-dir=
directory to install scripts to)
build-dir=
bz'build directory (where to install from))
force
fz-force installation (overwrite existing files))
skip-buildNz
skip the build stepsr

	build_dir
